title: ISic001031. Dedication recording board of magistrates
body:
Text encoding: Valentina Mignosa; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/PJDRZH66
1[ἐπὶ] [Φ]ιλ̣οκ[ρ]άτ̣[εο]ς̣ Ἀφροδ̣ί̣τ̣α̣[ι] Col. 1
2ἀγορανόμοι
3Διονυσόδωρος Ζωπύρου
4Εὐφραῖος Καλλικράτεος
5τριακάδαρχοι
6Δαμοκράτης Ἀριστοκράτεος
7Ἀγέας Ἀγέα
8Ἀπολλώνιος Ἀγάθωνος
9Ἕλωρις Ἀπολλωνίου
10Ἀριστοφάνης Ἀρχαγάθου
11Ἡρακλείδας Δαματρίου
12Ἀριστέας Ξένωνος Col. 2
13Κρίτων Κρίτωνος
14Ἐπίγονος Ἐπιγόνου
15γραμματεὺς καὶ
16φραδατὴρ
17Π̣ύρριχος Ἀριστογείτου
18ὑπογραφεύς
19Δαμοκράτης Φιλίου
20ὑπηρέτας
21Ἀριστομένης Ζωπύρου̣
22κᾶρυξ
23Μενεκράτης Σώσιος

Text encoding: Valentina Mignosa; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/PJDRZH66
1[....]Ι.ΟΚ[.]Α.[..].ΑΦΡΟ....[.]Col. 1

2ΑΓΟΡΑΝΟΜΟΙ
3ΔΙΟΝΥΣΟΔΩΡΟΣΖΩΠΥΡΟΥ
4ΕΥΦΡΑΙΟΣΚΑΛΛΙΚΡΑΤΕΟΣ
5ΤΡΙΑΚΑΔΑΡΧΟΙ
6ΔΑΜΟΚΡΑΤΗΣΑΡΙΣΤΟΚΡΑΤΕΟΣ
7ΑΓΕΑΣΑΓΕΑ
8ΑΠΟΛΛΩΝΙΟΣΑΓΑΘΩΝΟΣ
9ΕΛΩΡΙΣΑΠΟΛΛΩΝΙΟΥ
10ΑΡΙΣΤΟΦΑΝΗΣΑΡΧΑΓΑΘΟΥ
11ΗΡΑΚΛΕΙΔΑΣΔΑΜΑΤΡΙΟΥ
12ΑΡΙΣΤΕΑΣΞΕΝΩΝΟΣCol. 2

13ΚΡΙΤΩΝΚΡΙΤΩΝΟΣ
14ΕΠΙΓΟΝΟΣΕΠΙΓΟΝΟΥ
15ΓΡΑΜΜΑΤΕΥΣΚΑΙ
16ΦΡΑΔΑΤΗΡ
17.ΥΡΡΙΧΟΣΑΡΙΣΤΟΓΕΙΤΟΥ
18ΥΠΟΓΡΑΦΕΥΣ
19ΔΑΜΟΚΡΑΤΗΣΦΙΛΙΟΥ
20ΥΠΗΡΕΤΑΣ
21ΑΡΙΣΤΟΜΕΝΗΣΖΩΠΥΡΟ.
22ΚΑΡΥΞ
23ΜΕΝΕΚΡΑΤΗΣΣΩΣΙΟΣ

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text after Pugliese Carratelli 1956

translation

commentary

bibliography

  • Amati 1827 348 no.5 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10003116
  • Franz 1853 5426 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001250
  • Kaibel 1890 211 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001072
  • Pugliese Carratelli 1956 no.6 ph https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001394
  • Dubois 1989 110 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000187

Neatly carved and regular letters, mostly without serifs, but some terminal wedges. Alpha with straight bar; epsilon on occasion has a slightly shorter mid-bar; zeta in form of I with wide horizontals; theta has short detached cross-bar; kappa has full-length arms; mu has vertical first and last, full length mid-strokes; xsi has three equal horiztonal bars; omicron is only slightly smaller than the other letters; pi has extended horizontal; rho has small rounded closed eye; sigma has horizontal top and bottom, with slihgtly variable mid-strokes; phi has small oval eye, with vertical often extended; omega is notably variable, always closed, but ranging from tear-drop to full circle on or even above and detached from the base line.

Line 1 18 Line 2-23 11-15 (with omicron down to 9 and phi up to 20) Interlineation line 1 to 2
Licensed under a Creative Commons-Attribution 4.0 licence.

Alpha with straight bar; epsilon on occasion has a slightly shorter mid-bar; zeta in form of I with wide horizontals; theta has short detached cross-bar; kappa has full-length arms; mu has vertical first and last, full length mid-strokes; xsi has three equal horiztonal bars; omicron is only slightly smaller than the other letters; pi has extended horizontal; rho has small rounded closed eye; sigma has horizontal top and bottom, with slihgtly variable mid-strokes; phi has small oval eye, with vertical often extended; omega is notably variable, always closed, but ranging from tear-drop to full circle on or even above and detached from the base line.
